input: Welcome to samplolid.com, a free online resource for downloading sample files in a wide variety  of digital formats, whether you are a software developer testing file upload functionality,  a quality assurance engineer validating media players, a student learning about digital  formats, or simply someone who needs a quick test file.  Samplolid provides ready-to-use files that you can download instantly, completely free  of charge.  In this recording, we will walk you through every aspect of the samplolid platform, exploring  the formats we offer, the technical details behind each one, and the many ways these test  files can be used in your projects and workflows.  Let us begin with image formats.  Images are perhaps the most fundamental type of digital media, and samplolid offers test  files in five major image formats, JPEG, PNG, SVG, GIF, and web.  Image format has its own strengths, trade-offs, and ideal use cases, and understanding these  differences is essential.
summary: Samplolid provides ready-to-use files that you can download instantly, completely free of charge. Images are perhaps the most fundamental type of digital media. Samplolid offers test files in five major image formats, JPEG, PNG, SVG, GIF, and web.

input:
🧭 SQL Learning Roadmap (Full Map)
🟢 PHASE 1: Foundations (What you already started)

Goal: Understand basic database operations

Topics:
CREATE DATABASE, USE
CREATE TABLE
Data types (INT, VARCHAR, DECIMAL, DATE)
INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
ALTER TABLE
DROP, TRUNCATE

👉 Practice:

Create tables like students, products, orders
🔵 PHASE 2: Data Retrieval (Core SQL Skill)

Goal: Learn to query data effectively

Topics:
SELECT basics
WHERE conditions
Operators: =, >, <, >=, <=, !=
Logical: AND, OR, NOT
ORDER BY
LIMIT
SELECT * FROM snacks WHERE Sprice > 100 ORDER BY Sprice DESC;
🟡 PHASE 3: Filtering & Pattern Matching

Goal: Write smarter queries

Topics:
LIKE, %, _
IN, NOT IN
BETWEEN
IS NULL, IS NOT NULL
🟠 PHASE 4: Aggregate Functions

Goal: Summarize data

Topics:
COUNT(), SUM(), AVG(), MIN(), MAX()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snacks;
🔴 PHASE 5: GROUPING (Very Important)

Goal: Analyze grouped data

Topics:
GROUP BY
HAVING
SELECT Sname, COUNT(*) 
FROM snacks 
GROUP BY Sname;
🟣 PHASE 6: JOINS (🔥 Must Master)

Goal: Work with multiple tables

Topics:
INNER JOIN
LEFT JOIN
RIGHT JOIN
FULL JOIN (concept)
SELECT o.order_id, c.name
FROM orders o
INNER JOIN customers c
ON o.customer_id = c.id;
🟤 PHASE 7: Subqueries

Goal: Nested queries

Topics:
Subqueries in WHERE, FROM, SELECT
SELECT * FROM snacks
WHERE Sprice > (SELECT AVG(Sprice) FROM snacks);
⚫ PHASE 8: Constraints & Data Integrity

Goal: Design safe databases

Topics:
PRIMARY KEY
FOREIGN KEY
UNIQUE
NOT NULL
DEFAULT
AUTO_INCREMENT
⚪ PHASE 9: Database Design (💡 Very Important)

Goal: Think like a developer

Topics:
Normalization (1NF, 2NF, 3NF)
Relationships:
One-to-One
One-to-Many
Many-to-Many
ER Diagrams
🟧 PHASE 10: Indexes & Performance

Goal: Optimize queries

Topics:
INDEX
Query performance basics
🟩 PHASE 11: Advanced SQL

Goal: Real-world SQL skills

Topics:
VIEWS
Stored Procedures
Triggers
Transactions (COMMIT, ROLLBACK)
Window Functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK)
🟦 PHASE 12: Practice & Real Use

Goal: Apply everything

Do:
Build mini projects:
Student Management System
E-commerce DB
Solve SQL problems (important!)
summary: Learn how to create tables like students, products, orders. Write smarter queries and work with multiple tables. Build mini projects: Student Management System E-commerce DB.

input:
Machine learning is a branch of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn from data and improve performance without explicit programming. It is widely used in recommendation systems, healthcare, image recognition, and self-driving cars.

There are several types of machine learning including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning. Supervised learning uses labeled datasets, while unsupervised learning discovers hidden patterns in data.

Deep learning is a specialized area of machine learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers. It is highly effective in speech recognition, natural language processing, and computer vision tasks.

Machine learning is transforming industries by enabling automation, prediction, and intelligent decision-making systems.
summary: Machine learning is a branch of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn from data and improve performance without explicit programming. It is widely used in recommendation systems, healthcare, image recognition, and self-driving cars.

Supervised learning uses labeled datasets, while unsupervised learning discovers hidden patterns in data.
Deep learning is a specialized area of machine learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers. It is highly effective in speech recognition, natural language processing, and computer vision tasks.Machine learning is transforming industries by enabling automation, prediction, and intelligent decision-making systems.
